description:
Automated translation (refer to source for accuracy)

v1.23.0 Overall Look

• Current location display always visible at the top of the screen — breadcrumb navigation (Hanno City > Bus > ...) stays fixed on every page, so you always know where you are even while scrolling long pages. Also fixes the uncomfortable shifting of content around iPhone's Dynamic Island and notch.

• Myはんのう logo added to the top — displayed in red at all times. When you scroll, a small date (5/22(Fri)) appears next to the logo; tap it to jump back to the top.

• Large date numerals and garbage collection time digits now use digital clock-style font — 7-segment LCD display (DSEG7 Classic), like an alarm clock.

• Body text size and color improved for readability — helper text slightly enlarged, dim text made darker.

v1.23.0 Bus

• Bus schedules now scroll with the full page — previously only the timetable box scrolled separately, making it hard to touch.

• Timetable header (departure station / destination / current time) now fixed at the top — you always see which timetable you're viewing while scrolling.

• "Beta version" label changed to "Alpha version" with warning banner added — timetable data may contain errors or omissions; please also check the official timetables from each operator.

v1.23.0 Favorite Shops / Events

• "Schedule" and "Map" links now in clear pill-shaped buttons — previously just calendar and map icons that were hard to recognize as tappable. Now shows as 📅 Schedule 📍 Map 📋 Details with text.

• Long URLs in event details now wrap properly — fixed the horizontal scrolling issue.

• Favorite shop search results use the same pill format — direct Google Maps link from shop name has been removed and separated into a 📍 Map pill.

v1.23.0 Garbage

• Garbage section's course "Details" and town "Change" buttons now use the same compact pill format as the rest of the app.

v1.23.0 Other

• "Credits" section added to footer — lists the fonts used (DSEG / BIZ UDPGothic, both under SIL OFL license) and data sources.
